title: Metro Madrid add MTR
description: This mod adds Blocks,Items and a lot of Decoration from metro of madrid.
body:
Metro madrid add mtr is a add on for minecraft java 1.20.1 .
The mod add 213 or 214 blocks for create stations like the metro of madrid.
The mod is perferct with Minecraft Transit Railway mod but you can create stations with normal minecraft minecarts. :)

To enjoy this mod so much Please Download the Minecraft Transit Railway Mod.


Extras:

If you use this add on with MTR mod, 5 blocks named "platfomrs ligners" need the original platform block of MTR mod under this block.

Some blocks have bugs in the textures.

Information:

The mod adds 7 or 8 New pages for the station creation with Minecraft Transit Railway

1.Metro Recourse:

This page adds Starting blocks like the "Podotactile Block" or the "Line Block" all this blocks of this page adds blocks for little decoration and have te MOST IMPORTANT blocks for the reality of the metro of madrid:)

2.Stations Decorations,Shop Utilities and decoration and  Light Metro Tramlink:

This pages are complete diferent but they adds some of the biggest futionality add the stations of metro of madrid. SD adds seats, stairs, fences,and more.
SU&D adds things for your shop in a station.
LMT adds 6 signs for the outdoor of the station.

3.Metro Misc. And Wall in stations:

This pages are very similar to each other. They adds decoration for the walls and colorful line blocks to paint your stations.

4.Cercanias Stations:

The last page of this mod is this. The other train system in Madrid is de "Cercanías Renfe" there system is a suburban train system to connect with the city. With this page of the mod, you can create cercanias renfe stations.


Please, ¡Enjoy! and Thank You for download this mod

Created with MCreator by Pura. :)

Visit The Purafanicos Channel on Youtube :)
